acceptedConstraints.summary: The e2e fixture requires admin-shell, user-management, and role-permission-management as the stable core.
acceptedConstraints.effect: The standalone app-manifest must keep the core-admin module set intact.

acceptedConstraints.summary: The planning output excludes project-management, project-repository-management, kanban-management, and ticket-management for this fixture.
acceptedConstraints.effect: Those delivery-management modules must remain out of the manifest.

basis.summary: The core-admin profile exactly matches the deterministic planning output.
The planning output resolves every required manifest field and leaves no unresolved conflicts.

prerequisites: Keep admin-shell, user-management, and role-permission-management in the manifest
Leave the excluded delivery-management modules deferred for this fixture
boundaryNotes: This is optional guidance for the e2e fixture. The fixture uses the suggested profile.

basis.summary: The fixture explicitly excludes the delivery-management module family.
Project-management is the dependency root for repository, kanban, and ticket workflows.

prerequisites: Regenerate the planning artifact before reintroducing project-management
boundaryNotes: Because this recommendation is constraint-derived, contributors should not override it by editing the recommendation artifact alone.

notes: E2E fixture: produce a standalone app-manifest with core-admin modules.
The leave-request descriptor-driven module is validated separately from the manifest.

followUpGuidance.guidance: Validate the leave-request management-module descriptor against the descriptor schema before proceeding to assembly.

manifestPreparationBoundary.nextStep: Validate the leave-request descriptor, create the standalone app-manifest, then invoke ./scripts/platform-tool.sh assembly scaffold.
